response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and post-performance talk closely match the structure of the reference JSON, but with key corrections.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for song details. For the talk segment, corrected the '7周年' typo from the reference JSON's template notes to the actual spoken '5周年' (5th Anniversary), and manually transcribed guest names 'Noel' and 'Lui' mentioned in the talk.
3. Timing & Pacing: Tightly aligned timings to match vocal starts and stops. Truncated boundaries where spoken text transitions quickly, keeping subtitles synchronized and highly readable.

subtitles.original: というわけで、Great Daysをお届けしましたー！
subtitles.english: And with that, we performed "Great Days"!

subtitles.original: みんな楽しんでくれましたか？
subtitles.english: Did everyone enjoy it?

subtitles.original: ここまではですね、まず『ユメヲカケル！』。
subtitles.english: Up until now, first we had "Yumewokakeru!".

subtitles.original: この曲はですね、スバルもうめっちゃね、もともと大好きで絶対にやろうって決めてたんですけど、
subtitles.english: Subaru loves this song so much, I had absolutely decided to do it from the start.

subtitles.original: その結果、見事にウマ娘のアプリめっちゃやるようになりました！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: As a result, I've ended up playing the Umamusume app a ton! Thank you!

subtitles.original: そんな大好きな曲をみんなとできて、とっても楽しかったです！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: I was so happy to do my favorite song with everyone, it was so much fun! Thank you!

subtitles.original: そして続いて、百花繚乱でかっこよく踊れました！どうでしたか？
subtitles.english: And next, we did a cool dance to "Hyakka Ryouran"! How was it?

subtitles.original: このひらひらりが結構難しくて、頑張ったんですけど見てくれましたか？
subtitles.english: These fluttering ribbons were quite difficult, but did you see them?

subtitles.original: でもすごく踊って楽しかったです！
subtitles.english: But it was so much fun to dance to!

subtitles.original: そして、『こんなんじゃない！』。夢叶えし者になった時点で絶対にやろうって思ってたんですけど、
subtitles.english: And then, "Konna n Janai!". I wanted to do this from the moment I became a "dream-fulfiller"...

subtitles.original: ノエちゃんとルイに絶対にペンライトを振ってほしいと思って、
subtitles.english: I absolutely wanted Noel-chan and Lui to wave their penlights,

subtitles.original: 呼ばせていただきました！楽しんでもらえたらとっても嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: so I invited them! I hope you all enjoyed it.

subtitles.original: そして『Great Days』はですね、ジョジョ4部の曲なんですけど、
subtitles.english: And "Great Days" is a song from JoJo Part 4, which Subaru absolutely loves...

subtitles.original: もう絶対これでバトンをするんだと、こうやってグルグル回してね、
subtitles.english: and I was determined to twirl a baton to this, round and round like this,

subtitles.original: 今年も飛ばさせていただいたんですけど、
subtitles.english: and I got to toss it again this year!

subtitles.original: スバルの魂と書いてプライドと読む、魂のバトンを見ていただけましたか？
subtitles.english: Did you see my baton of soul—written as "soul" but read as "pride"?

subtitles.original: もうすごかったんだから、本当に！
subtitles.english: It was seriously, seriously amazing!

subtitles.original: というわけで、そんなスバルのこだわりと思いがいっぱい詰まったパートでした！
subtitles.english: So, this part was packed with Subaru's obsession and strong feelings!

subtitles.original: そしてなんと、ここからは嬉しいお知らせとなっております！
subtitles.english: And now, we have some exciting news!

subtitles.original: なんと！大空スバル活動5周年記念ライブのグッズ販売告知！
subtitles.english: We have an announcement for Oozora Subaru's 5th Anniversary Live merchandise!

subtitles.original: こちらをご覧くださーい！
subtitles.english: Please take a look at this!

subtitles.original: グッズは4種類あります！ということで、さっそく見ていきましょう！
subtitles.english: There are four kinds of merch! So let's take a look right away!

subtitles.original: イラストはしぐれうい先生に描いていただきました！母ちゃんありがとう！
subtitles.english: The illustrations were drawn by Shigure Ui-sensei! Thanks, Mom!

subtitles.original: イラストテーマは王道アイドルスバルです！
subtitles.english: The illustration theme is "Classic Idol Subaru"!

subtitles.original: それでは詳細を見ていきましょう！まずは、こちら！
subtitles.english: Let's look at the details! First up is this!

subtitles.original: スバルがファンサ！ラバーマット
subtitles.english: Subaru's Fan Service! Rubber Mat
